name: Chandanwari
description: A magnificent snow-covered valley that serves as the official starting point for the holy Amarnath Yatra. It is famous for snow sledding and immense natural beauty.
history: It has been the traditional base camp for pilgrims undertaking the strenuous trek to the Amarnath Cave for centuries.
famousFor: Amarnath Yatra base camp, snow sledging, scenic drives.
bestTime: March to May (Snow), July to August (Yatra)
